{
  EmployeeActivator.g.cs:
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable
namespace Excelsior;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Runtime.CompilerServices;
file static class EmployeeActivatorRegistration
{
  [ModuleInitializer]
  internal static void Register() =>
    GeneratedActivators.Register<global::Employee>(Create);

  static global::Employee Create(IReadOnlyDictionary<string, object?> values)
  {
    var instance = new global::Employee();
    if (values.TryGetValue("Lf", out var sv0)) instance.Lf = (string)sv0!;
    if (values.TryGetValue("Cr", out var sv1)) instance.Cr = (string)sv1!;
    if (values.TryGetValue("CrLf", out var sv2)) instance.CrLf = (string)sv2!;
    if (values.TryGetValue("Tab", out var sv3)) instance.Tab = (string)sv3!;
    if (values.TryGetValue("Quote", out var sv4)) instance.Quote = (string)sv4!;
    if (values.TryGetValue("Backslash", out var sv5)) instance.Backslash = (string)sv5!;
    if (values.TryGetValue("Mixed", out var sv6)) instance.Mixed = (int)sv6!;
    return instance;
  }
},
  EmployeeColumnAttributes.g.cs:
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable
namespace Excelsior;
using System.Runtime.CompilerServices;
file static class EmployeeColumnAttributesRegistration
{
  [ModuleInitializer]
  internal static void Register()
  {
    GeneratedColumnAttributes.Register(typeof(global::Employee), "Lf", new(Heading: "line1\nline2"));
    GeneratedColumnAttributes.Register(typeof(global::Employee), "Cr", new(Heading: "line1\rline2"));
    GeneratedColumnAttributes.Register(typeof(global::Employee), "CrLf", new(Heading: "line1\r\nline2"));
    GeneratedColumnAttributes.Register(typeof(global::Employee), "Tab", new(Heading: "col1\tcol2"));
    GeneratedColumnAttributes.Register(typeof(global::Employee), "Quote", new(Heading: "say \"hi\""));
    GeneratedColumnAttributes.Register(typeof(global::Employee), "Backslash", new(Heading: "back\\slash"));
    GeneratedColumnAttributes.Register(typeof(global::Employee), "Mixed", new(Format: "0\n0", NullDisplay: "n/a\tvalue"));
  }
},
  EmployeeRowReader.g.cs:
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable
namespace Excelsior;
using System;
using System.Runtime.CompilerServices;
file static class EmployeeRowReaderRegistration
{
  [ModuleInitializer]
  internal static void Register() =>
    GeneratedRowReaders.Register<global::Employee>(ReadRow);

  static global::Employee ReadRow(global::DocumentFormat.OpenXml.Spreadsheet.Cell?[] cells, string?[]? sharedStrings, global::System.Action<int, string> onError)
  {
    var instance = new global::Employee();
    instance.Lf = global::Excelsior.ExcelsiorReaders.ReadString(cells[0], sharedStrings);
    instance.Cr = global::Excelsior.ExcelsiorReaders.ReadString(cells[1], sharedStrings);
    instance.CrLf = global::Excelsior.ExcelsiorReaders.ReadString(cells[2], sharedStrings);
    instance.Tab = global::Excelsior.ExcelsiorReaders.ReadString(cells[3], sharedStrings);
    instance.Quote = global::Excelsior.ExcelsiorReaders.ReadString(cells[4], sharedStrings);
    instance.Backslash = global::Excelsior.ExcelsiorReaders.ReadString(cells[5], sharedStrings);
    instance.Mixed = global::Excelsior.ExcelsiorReaders.ReadInt(cells[6], sharedStrings, 6, onError);
    return instance;
  }
},
  EmployeeSheetBuilderExtensions.g.cs:
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable
namespace Excelsior;
using System;
public static class EmployeeSheetBuilderExtensions
{
  public static ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> LfColumn(
    this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder,
    Action<ColumnConfig<global::Employee, string>> configuration)
    => builder.Column(_ => _.Lf, configuration);

  public static void LfHeadingText(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, string value)
    => builder.HeadingText(_ => _.Lf, value);

  public static void LfOrder(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, int? value)
    => builder.Order(_ => _.Lf, value);

  public static void LfWidth(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, int? value)
    => builder.Width(_ => _.Lf, value);

    => builder.MinWidth(_ => _.Lf, value);

    => builder.MaxWidth(_ => _.Lf, value);
